data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. HALLUCINATIONS is a first starter from the D Fahey & K Wyllie kennel by My Redeemer out of Chatty Mavis. Drawn favourably and can capitalize. Lot to like about his trial (17.32) win on this track over 295m and expected to run well. 6. HOMEBUSH RORY has been out of the placings at his last couple but on the winners' heels when placing three back (23.29) in a Class 0 at Ascot Park. Key player on best and worth another try. 3. HOMEBUSH REMI is by Dyna Villa out of Homebush Fanta making debut. Did run fourth in a five dog trial (17.32) on this track over 295m. Market to provide the best guide to his chances.","runners":[2,6,3],"exclusive":false}
